batch.jobdefinition.evaluateonexit.CfnAb: Specifies an array of up to 5 conditions to be met, and an action to take (`RETRY` or `EXIT`) if all conditions are met. If none of the `EvaluateOnExit` conditions in a `RetryStrategy` match, then the job is retried.

batch.jobdefinition.evaluateonexit.Actio.Description: Specifies the action to take if all of the specified conditions (`onStatusReason`, `onReason`, and `onExitCode`) are met. The values aren't case sensitive.

batch.jobdefinition.evaluateonexit.OnExi.Description: Contains a glob pattern to match against the decimal representation of the `ExitCode` returned for a job. The pattern can be up to 512 characters long. It can contain only numbers, and can end with an asterisk (*) so that only the start of the string needs to be an exact match.  The string can contain up to 512 characters.

batch.jobdefinition.evaluateonexit.OnRea.Description: Contains a glob pattern to match against the `Reason` returned for a job. The pattern can contain up to 512 characters. It can contain letters, numbers, periods (.), colons (:), and white space (including spaces and tabs). It can optionally end with an asterisk (*) so that only the start of the string needs to be an exact match.

batch.jobdefinition.evaluateonexit.OnSta.Description: Contains a glob pattern to match against the `StatusReason` returned for a job. The pattern can contain up to 512 characters. It can contain letters, numbers, periods (.), colons (:), and white spaces (including spaces or tabs). It can optionally end with an asterisk (*) so that only the start of the string needs to be an exact match.
